sutta: once the exalted 1 was dwelling at gosambi in gosita park now the venerable anuruddha had gone apart during the known day rest and there there came to him a host of lovely davies of aries who saluted and stood at 1 side thus standing they addressed the vulnerable 1 and said master anuruda we are the fairies of lovely form in 3 degrees reveal power and have dominion we can assume in a moment any color we desire we can produce in a moment any sound we desire we can obtain in a moment any happiness we desire we master anuruddha are the fairies of lovely form and in these 3 degrees we have power and dominion then the verbal anuruda thought oh that these fairies would become all blue with blue faces blue garments and blue finery and those fairies knowing his thoughts became all blue with blue faces blue garments and blue finery then he thought oh that they would become all yellow all red all white with white faces white garments and white finery and at each thought they became so now some of the fairies sang some danced and some clapped their hands this is the 5 instruments of music when well tuned well played and properly struck by the skilled heal the sound at 1 sweet and charming alluring lovable and bewitching even so was the music of those fairies all bedecked at once sweet and charming alluring lovable and bewitching but the verbal anuruda kept his senses under control then taught the fairies master anuruddha is not enjoying this and immediately vanished in the evening the venerable anuruda arose from solitude and came where the exhorted 1 was and after saluting he sat down at 1 side so seated he told the exalted 1 all that had happened adding lord how many qualities have women who on the breaking up of the body after death are reborn among the fairies of lovely form 8 qualities have women on ruda who after death are reborn among the fairies of lovely form 1 8 here in arudha the husband to whom her parents give her out of love for her seeking her good in loving kindness and foreign regard she will get up before him retire after him be obedient to his wishes lovely in her ways and gentle in speech whosoever is honored by her husband as mother father recluse of brahmin such she reverences honors esteems and respects on their arrival she offers the seed and water whatever her husband's home industries whether in wool cotton or cotton therein she is deft and nimble gifted with an inquiring turn of mind into all such undertakings she is able to arrange and carry them out of whatever her husband's household consists slaves messengers are workful she knows the work of each by what has been done she knows their remissness by what has not been done she knows the strength and the weakness of the sick she divides the hard and soft food each according to his share when her husband brings home money corn silver or gold she keeps it secure by watch and ward of it she is no robber thief squanderer waster she is a lay disciple who has found refuge in the buddha in dhamma and sangha she keeps the precepts abstaining from taking life from stealing from especially lusts from a duck from lying from drinking strong during the clock the cause of sloth she is charitable dwelling at home with heart burst of the stain of stinginess given over to charity open handed taking delight in giving you made to asking she finds joy in arms giving these are the 8 qualities women have who after death are reborn among the fairies of lovely form that's the end of the sutta
commentary: it's quite an interesting suta because the parable anuruddha he went to the forest after taking his meal the middle of the day i went into the forest and in the forest when a monk is alone sometimes these spirits come to him because he's all alone so these days fairies came to him and showed their ability to change their colors and to play music et cetera and but senses and uh controls were the fairies left and then the when consulted the buddha the buddha said now that a woman who is born as this type of area of lovely form she has 8 qualities now she serves her husband secondly she honors her husband's parents and monks third she's capable of managing the husband's business the fourth is capable in running the household the fifth regards the husband's wealth 6 she takes refuge in the buddha dhamma and sangha [Music] the seventh she keeps the 5 precepts and the number 8 she's generous or charitable so that's the way to become a fairy of lovely former for a woman the next suta is
